advancements.cobblemon_pokestops.root.de: Discover the world of PokéStops and their unique features!
advancements.cobblemon_pokestops.used_10: Spin 100 PokéStops to achieve mastery in the world of Cobblemon and unlock exclusive rewards!
Spin 100 Winged PokéStops to achieve mastery in the world of Cobblemon and unlock exclusive rewards!
advancements.cobblemon_pokestops.used_20: Spin 200 PokéStops to become a legend in the world of Cobblemon and unlock legendary rewards!
Spin 200 Winged PokéStops to become a legend in the world of Cobblemon and unlock legendary rewards!
advancements.cobblemon_pokestops.used_25: Spin 25 PokéStops to show your dedication to exploring the world of Cobblemon and uncovering its secrets!
Spin 25 Winged PokéStops to show your dedication to exploring the world of Cobblemon and uncovering its secrets!
advancements.cobblemon_pokestops.used_30: Spin 300 PokéStops to achieve mythic status in the world of Cobblemon and unlock mythic rewards!
Spin 300 Winged PokéStops to achieve mythic status in the world of Cobblemon and unlock mythic rewards!
advancements.cobblemon_pokestops.used_40: Spin 400 PokéStops to achieve immortal status in the world of Cobblemon and unlock immortal rewards!
Spin 400 Winged PokéStops to achieve immortal status in the world of Cobblemon and unlock immortal rewards!
advancements.cobblemon_pokestops.used_50: Spin 500 PokéStops to achieve eternal status in the world of Cobblemon and unlock eternal rewards!
Spin 500 Winged PokéStops to achieve eternal status in the world of Cobblemon and unlock eternal rewards!
Spin 50 PokéStops to become a true explorer of the world of Cobblemon and uncover its hidden treasures!
Spin 50 Winged PokéStops to become a true explorer of the world of Cobblemon and uncover its hidden treasures!
advancements.cobblemon_pokestops.used_po: Spin a PokéStop for the first time to receive items and experience the thrill of discovery!
advancements.cobblemon_pokestops.used_wi: Spin a Winged PokéStop for the first time to uncover its unique rewards and experience the thrill of discovery!
message.cobblemon_pokestops.pokestop_coo: You can't spin the Pokestop for another %s!
message.cobblemon_pokestops.wingedstop_c: You can't spin the Winged Pokestop for another %s!
